subject: WM-0086 review: changes_requested
body: High: pnpm test:e2e --filter web-shell rewrites tracked coordination/artifacts/WM-0003/web-shell-smoke.png from the hardcoded screenshot path in apps/web/src/web-shell.e2e.test.ts, outside WM-0086 allowed paths and requiring manual generated-output cleanup after a required gate.
